required_preferences.fact: Records nightly audio journals on her phone using voice memos, as writing by hand is impossible with her right wrist in a cast

supersedes.fact: Journals travel experiences nightly, handwriting rather than using electronic devices

required_preferences.fact: Suspends regular magazine feature ideation sessions while focused on grant-funded documentary work, dedicating creative energy solely to the funded project and collaborations with local teams

supersedes.fact: Sets aside two days per month to brainstorm and propose new feature ideas exclusively for the magazine, shifting focus from pitching to multiple outlets

required_preferences.fact: Posts behind-the-scenes stories on Instagram after every travel day, never skips content updates during assignments
Plans travel logistics (flights, visas, accommodation) on Thursday evenings each week, never leaves arrangements last minute
Responds to client emails within 24 hours, even while abroad — never lets inbox pile up

Connects with clients and followers through personal Instagram updates about her recovery and daily life in Berlin, shifting from project-based content to personal storytelling until she can resume photography

persona: A solo freelance photographer who travels internationally for assignments
